sheers.title: Mastering the Art of Sheers
sheers.description: Our lightweight sheers are designed to invite natural light while preserving your privacy. Carefully woven for maximum durability and a soft, elegant drape, they form the perfect foundation for any window treatment.

drapery.title: Rich Textures & Heavy Drapery
drapery.description: Anchor your space with our premium heavy drapery. Engineered for superior light control, insulation, and acoustic dampening, these fabrics bring bold presence and deep, resonant colors to your interior.

variants.title: Vibrant Variants
variants.description: Extensive color options to match any design requirement.

dimensions.title: Exact Dimensions
dimensions.description: Precise width and weight specifications listed for every fabric.

quality.title: Premium Quality
quality.description: Durable compositions with optional leadbands for perfect draping.

products.title: New Arrivals
products.description: Our latest additions to the catalog.

hero.title: Weaving Excellence
hero.subtitle: Tuzemen Group is a premier manufacturer of high-quality sheers, heavy drapery, and accent textiles, rooted in the rich textile heritage of Bursa, Türkiye.

heritage.title: Our Heritage
heritage.p1: Located in the heart of Türkiye's textile capital, Tuzemen Group was founded with a singular vision: to engineer fabrics that bridge the gap between traditional craftsmanship and modern material science.
heritage.p2: For years, we have supplied designers, architects, and global retailers with premium textiles that define spaces. From the lightest, most delicate sheers to heavy, acoustic-dampening drapery, every roll of fabric that leaves our facility proves our commitment to quality.
heritage.p3: We control the entire production pipeline—from yarn selection to the final leadband finishing—ensuring that our strict standards are met at every single touchpoint.

video.title: See Our Process
video.description: Take a look inside our manufacturing facility and see how raw materials become premium textiles.

standards.title: The Tuzemen Standard
standards.description: Our reputation is built into the very threads of our products. Here is how we ensure high quality across our entire catalog.

facilities.title: Advanced Facilities
facilities.description: Our Bursa manufacturing hub uses state-of-the-art weaving and quality assurance technology to guarantee consistency across massive production runs.

testing.title: Rigorous Testing
testing.description: Every fabric undergoes severe stress tests for colorfastness, weight accuracy, and tear resistance before being approved for distribution.

finishing.title: Precision Finishing
finishing.description: From exact-width cutting to the clean integration of heavy leadbands, our finishing process ensures your fabrics are ready for immediate installation.

sustainability.title: Sustainable Practice
sustainability.description: We are committed to reducing our environmental footprint through water-recycling dye processes and responsibly sourced raw materials.

cta.title: Ready to elevate your inventory?
cta.description: Browse our complete catalog to find the exact specifications, compositions, and colors you need for your next project.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: Whether you are requesting fabric samples, inquiring about bulk orders, or looking to partner with us, our team is ready to assist you.

slides.title: Rich Accent Textiles
